Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.applicability, up.applicability AS applicability_1 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade = 1 AND (bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001 OR bs."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" - up."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" >= 0.001)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/4ee513b2d3c55a391bdacc5fd4f9e2bcb066d88cc7871fc5ca7283bb54334522/8e1a7f24-731f-4679-a993-65753afc220d/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
